titles.text: スプラッターワールド

descriptions.text: Splatterworld: Rick to Kyōfu no Daiō (Splatterworld: Rick vs. the Great King of Terror) is an RPG on the Famicom. It is a direct sequel to Splatterhouse: Wanpaku Graffiti. Originally set to release in Q1 of 1993 in Japan, it was later cancelled. The game was eventually posted online on Halloween 2025, and was given an English fan translation soon after.
